perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a Costco Wholesale logo and a display of pink Care Bears plushies. (2) A rapid sequence of various products follows, each shown for approximately 1-2 seconds. Items include snacks, household goods, seafood, meat, fruits, and beverages. (3) The camera captures close-up shots of the products on shelves or in refrigerated sections, accompanied by graphic text overlays showing price details. Hands are occasionally seen reaching for or pointing at items.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy, fast-paced electronic background track plays throughout. (2) A male voiceover speaks rapidly, announcing the name of each product and its discounted price in a promotional tone. (3) Subtle sound effects like 'dings' or transitional swooshes coincide with the text pop-ups and scene cuts.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles display the name of each product, followed by 'Original Price' (原價), 'Discount' (減), and 'Special Price' (特價) in Traditional Chinese. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: The opening frame features 'Costco Weekly Price Report' (好市多每週特價速報) and the date range '01/06 - 01/12'. (3) Tone: The text is bold, colorful, and emphasizes the magnitude of the savings.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Occasional hands visible handling products; 1 cartoon mascot in the intro.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: No human character is fully visible on screen; the focus is entirely on the products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Vibrant warehouse aisles, refrigerated display cases, and bulk shelving characteristic of a Costco retail environment.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Showcase -> Pricing Evidence
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To quickly showcase a variety of discounted products available at Costco Taiwan for the specific week, encouraging viewers to visit the store and purchase the highlighted items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, prices, and the Costco brand logo as the primary content.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced, price-focused narration and beat-synced editing style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This content is optimized for short-form social media platforms like TikTok or Reels, using speed and density to capture the viewer's attention and communicate high value in a short duration.
